strip.label: attention
strip.summary: World Model: 0 hard-failed, 1 soft-floor, 0 stale, 0 drifted, 19 unchecked, 126 passing. Industries: 13 (11 thesis: AI power and grid capacity, Bitcoin mining & hashpower / power arbitrage, Oil & gas royalty trusts / mineral streams, Exchange and clearing markets, Gold royalty and streaming, Hyperscaler cloud / AI platforms, Index / ratings / market-data croupiers, Nuclear / SMR firm power for AI grid, Pharma royalty / durable drug cash, Timberland REITs and timber ops, Permian / Southwest water & surface rights; 2 horizon: AGI / frontier model race, Robotaxi / autonomous mobility). Macro is a regime card, not an industry. Phase-likely themes: ai_power_land. Horizon converging: agi, robotaxi. Steady means hard gates held, not path certainty. Soft vol floors (Goodhart) never alone mark the strip broken.
strip.ev_stance: [P3] Buy dips when orientation+reinforcement hold and hard KPI gates pass; pause when hard thesis KPIs fail. Soft vol-floor misses are diligence noise. Context only; does not rewrite the universal contract or human decision.

claim_boundaries.reason: Thesis hygiene may use P3; market-path language capped at P3 (Darwin calm). Steady means gates held, not path certainty.

demotions.reason: Arrival-date quotes are observations, not Magis forecasts

Macro is a regime card, not an industry.
